ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., VALU FLOPs, VALU IOPs) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., Gflop, Giop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., floating-point, integer) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the performance metric (e.g., CPU, GPU, TPU) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hardware component (e.g., GPU, CPU, TPU) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of hardware component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hardware component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the hardware component (e.g., NVIDIA, AMD, Google) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the hardware component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark result */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware component being benchmarked */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "peak_value" REAL /* Peak value of the performance metric */,
  "pop" REAL /* Probability of precipitation (PoP) for the metric */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Test environment used to run the benchmark (e.g., Windows, Linux) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES hardware_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, engineer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., engineering, marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, analyst, engineer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that the permission belongs to */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action that the user is allowed to perform (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource that the permission applies to (e.g., benchmark results, visualizations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark result that the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES benchmark_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change log */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version that the change log belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action that was taken (e.g., edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark result that the visualization belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph, table) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES benchmark_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization type (e.g., chart, graph, table) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization type */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters required for the visualization type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_users" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has access to the visualization */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in relation to the visualization (e.g., owner, viewer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user for the visualization (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark result that the tag belongs to */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., gaming, scientific) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_tags_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES benchmark_results ("result_id")
)
